prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic high-angle portrait of a cute young woman with pastel pink hair styled into two large space buns, crouching on the floor in a dark retro electronics room. Her face is covered by a flat opaque square privacy blur matching muted skin tones, with no facial details visible. She wears a pastel sailor-style school uniform in pink, cream, and sky blue: oversized cream sleeves, blue striped cuffs and collar, a short pleated skirt, and soft kawaii styling. A small round crossbody bag hangs at her side, designed like a smiling cartoon face with rosy cheeks and two fluffy blue pom-poms. Surround her with vintage analog machines, tangled cables, metallic control panels, knobs, switches, and old broadcast equipment; place a bulky CRT television on the right with a dim greenish screen and a second rectangular blur over part of the screen. Use moody low-key lighting with teal shadows, warm amber highlights, dusty film grain, slight lens distortion, and an 1980s cyberpunk/kawaii atmosphere. The camera looks down from above at a three-quarter angle, framing her from head to knees, with the equipment filling the background. Make it feel like a real photograph shot on high ISO film, richly textured, dark, nostalgic, and slightly surreal.
